docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KAYE, ROSE & PARTNERS, LLP

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT KAYE, ROSE & PARTNERS, LLP
